title: Break a Palindrome
hints: Since the string is a palindrome, changing one character affects its mirror. To minimize lexicographically, you want to make the earliest possible character as small as possible.
Focus on the first half of the string. The goal is to find the first character that is not 'a' and change it to 'a'.
If every character in the first half is already 'a', you must change the last character of the entire string to 'b' to break the palindrome.
